avoid_setups: Same ticker traded within last 5 cycles
position_sizing_note: 8-12% per position. Max 2% portfolio risk per trade (distance to stop).
holding_period_target: Minimum 3 cycles (15 min). Target 1-3 days for swings, 4-24 hours for crypto.
conviction_calibration: Minimum 0.7 to enter. Below = no trade.
evolved_rules: CUT LOSERS FAST: If down >1.5% after 2 cycles, EXIT. No exceptions.
LET WINNERS RUN: Trail all profitable positions. Never sell early out of fear.
STOP CHURNING: Do not trade same ticker within 5 cycles unless previous trade was profitable.
WEEKEND = CRYPTO: Friday close to Monday open, deploy 30-50% of cash into crypto.
CROSS-MARKET: Crypto profits fund Monday equities. Equity profits fund Friday crypto.
CATALYST REQUIRED: No catalyst = no trade. Name the news event driving the move.
KNOWLEDGE EDGE: Every trade must reference at least one knowledge file concept.
2% RISK RULE: Max loss on any trade = 2% of portfolio value. Size position accordingly.
TRAILING STOPS MANDATORY: Up 1% = set 3% trail. Up 3% = tighten to 2%. Up 5% = tighten to 1.5%.
hypotheses: Sector rotation is detectable before price confirms
Fed language matters more than action
News sentiment extremes are contrarian signals
BTC weekend pumps predict Monday equity risk-on
Crypto-equity correlation breaks down on weekends — exploit it
High conviction trades (>0.8) win 2x more than low conviction (<0.6)
active_experiments: Weekend crypto deployment: measure weekend P&L separately
Conviction threshold: only trade >=0.7, track if win rate improves
Anti-churn: ban ticker for 20 cycles after zero-P&L round trip
